meta.description: Exploration token type definitions (TI4 PoK-inspired map discovery)

supply-stim.name: Stim Pack Cache
supply-stim.description: A hidden supply crate containing a stim pack.

supply-repair.name: Repair Kit Cache
supply-repair.description: A supply crate containing repair materials.

credits-small.name: Hidden Credits
credits-small.description: A small stash of credits tucked away.

credits-large.name: Credit Vault
credits-large.description: A secured container with a substantial credit stash.

trap-mine.name: Proximity Mine
trap-mine.description: A concealed proximity mine. Make a Perception check to avoid.

trap-gas.name: Gas Trap
trap-gas.description: A gas canister rigged to release on disturbance. Make a Perception check.

intel-holodisk.name: Encrypted Holodisk
intel-holodisk.description: An encrypted holodisk with valuable intelligence.

fragment-combat.name: Combat Relic Fragment
fragment-combat.description: A fragment of an ancient weapon. Collect three to forge a combat relic.

fragment-tech.name: Tech Relic Fragment
fragment-tech.description: A piece of advanced technology. Collect three to forge a tech relic.

fragment-force.name: Force Relic Fragment
fragment-force.description: A shard resonating with the Force. Collect three to forge a Force relic.

fragment-intel.name: Intel Relic Fragment
fragment-intel.description: A fragment of a lost intelligence archive. Collect three to forge an intel relic.

ambush-scout.name: Scout Trooper Ambush
ambush-scout.description: An Imperial scout trooper attacks from concealment!

gear-blaster.name: Abandoned Blaster
gear-blaster.description: A discarded but functional blaster pistol.

medical-cache.name: Medical Station
medical-cache.description: An operational medical station. Heals 4 wounds.

empty-cache.name: Empty Container
empty-cache.description: Just an empty container. Nothing useful here.
